documentation.file_docstring: Configuration for the media stream handler.
inline_comments: Active media stream session.
Manages WebSocket connections for Twilio media streams.
Handle WebSocket upgrade for media stream connections.
Handle new WebSocket connection from Twilio.
Forward audio to STT
Handle stream start event.
Prefer token from start message customParameters (set via TwiML <Parameter>),
falling back to query string token. Twilio strips query params from WebSocket
URLs but reliably delivers <Parameter> values in customParameters.
Create STT session
Set up transcript callbacks
Notify connection BEFORE STT connect so TTS can work even if STT fails
Connect to OpenAI STT (non-blocking, log errors but don't fail the call)
Handle stream stop event.
Get an active session with an open WebSocket, or undefined if unavailable.
Send a message to a stream's WebSocket if available.
Send audio to a specific stream (for TTS playback). Audio should be mu-law encoded at 8kHz mono.
Send a mark event to track audio playback position.
Clear audio buffer (interrupt playback).
Queue a TTS operation for sequential playback. Only one TTS operation plays at a time per stream to prevent overlap.
Clear TTS queue and interrupt current playback (barge-in).
Get active session by call ID.
Close all sessions.
Process the TTS queue for a stream. Uses iterative approach to avoid stack accumulation from recursion.
Twilio Media Stream message format.

functions.name: handleUpgrade
functions.doc: Handle WebSocket upgrade for media stream connections.

functions.name: handleConnection
functions.doc: Handle new WebSocket connection from Twilio.

functions.name: sendToStream
functions.doc: Send a message to a stream's WebSocket if available.

functions.name: sendAudio
functions.doc: Send audio to a specific stream (for TTS playback).     Audio should be mu-law encoded at 8kHz mono.

functions.name: sendMark
functions.doc: Send a mark event to track audio playback position.

functions.name: clearTtsQueue
functions.doc: Clear TTS queue and interrupt current playback (barge-in).

functions.name: processQueue
functions.doc: Process the TTS queue for a stream.     Uses iterative approach to avoid stack accumulation from recursion.

classes.name: MediaStreamHandler
classes.doc: Manages WebSocket connections for Twilio media streams.

concerns: Multiple concerns detected: database, api, business_logic, auth, logging
